MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on June 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
